case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. JERROLD HORGAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: FEE (TRANSACTION ID # 210038286) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210038286) TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 210038286) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210039040), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. SERVED JUN-07-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HORGAN, JERROLD
DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 210077887) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210038286) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HORGAN, JERROLD DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-27-2023
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210038286) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $271.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 210077887) AS TO DEFENDANT HORGAN, JERROLD
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210077887) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 585(D) AND 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 210077887) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORGAN, JERROLD $1,181.22 PRINCIPAL, $271.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,453.12, SEE SCANNED DOC
